objective: Split multibrot shaders by exponent responsibility while preserving catalog/pubspec shader asset behavior. Topology complete: integer_powers/ owns z^n + c integer power parameter-plane shaders, fractional_powers/ owns non-integer exponent polar-power variants, inverse_powers/ owns negative/inverse exponent variants. Root holds no shader files.
completedSlices: Kept focused multibrot shader asset tests covering catalog paths existing on disk and pubspec registration.
Moved all 13 root multibrot shader files into responsibility subfolders: integer_powers, fractional_powers, inverse_powers.
Catalog shaderAsset strings, pubspec shader registrations, power regression test paths, and CPU formula provenance comments already point at the responsibility subfolders.

Shared-code pass: duplicated GLSL palette/color helpers remain intentionally in each shader because Flutter shader assets are compiled as standalone FragmentPrograms and no proven local include/shared GLSL contract exists in this folder.
